title: as needs to show Eva more often
display_title: as needs to show Eva more often
wikitext:
[]: [as] needs to show Eva more often             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Tue Aug 12, 2008 4:54 pm They've shown it a grand total of once. They still have the license, and it's regarded as one of the best anime series ever... so I wonder what gives?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Aug 12, 2008 6:25 pm They've actually showed it about 3 times, but w/e. Eva might not be the type of anime kids nowadays want to see. And it's not nearly as popular among the youth as it once may have been. Kids want the clishe, popular, typical anime that they understand.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 12, 2008 6:29 pm yeah they showed it a few times, that's how I discovered this anime, so god bless them!

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Aug 12, 2008 6:49 pm NGE simply doesn't fit in with AS's general audience. I think NGE is just, in general, way too intelligent for general American audiences overall. Even it's general appeal in Japan seems to stem from uniquely Eastern quirks and fetishes that don't exist (much) over here. Besides, the dub sucks.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 12, 2008 6:54 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: NGE simply doesn't fit in with AS's general audience. I think NGE is just, in general, way too intelligent for general American audiences overall. Even it's general appeal in Japan seems to stem from uniquely Eastern quirks and fetishes that don't exist (much) over here. Besides, the dub sucks.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Aug 12, 2008 7:09 pm Action_Bastard wrote: On the contrary, there are some things you get in the dub one that you just don't get in the sub one, and vice-versa.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 12, 2008 7:11 pm Why so.....?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Aug 12, 2008 7:39 pm Action_Bastard wrote: Why so.....?

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 12, 2008 7:41 pm If you are referring to the Platinum version sold at Best Buy and all the other American releases before that, then yes.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Aug 12, 2008 7:43 pm Action_Bastard wrote: Why so.....?

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 12, 2008 7:58 pm Well, I guess I am one of those "weirdos" who doesn't mind the dub. I have seen the sub as well, and I find both of them just fine.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Aug 12, 2008 8:09 pm Well, don't let my opinion dictate your tastes. Weirdo

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Tue Aug 12, 2008 9:53 pm Adult Swim viewers want people with swords, blood, demons, and lots of blood shed. Also, guns are also very welcome. None of the viewers want to spend fifteen minutes or more thinking when the next showing of Bleach is gonna come on in five. Yeah, I like Bleach. I'm a dubbie/subbie person. I watch a dub if I don't wanna spend a lot of time reading. Too bad so many dubs mess up the messages and effects of shows a lot.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Aug 12, 2008 9:58 pm plz plz don't turn this into another "dub vs. sub thread", the original one got so ugly I don't want to go there again anyway, those who have been here since the days of E "M" F know how much I think [adult swim] is f-cked up and how I only watched it for the anime, which has really gotten so stale I haven't watch with regularity in a while, I'm hoping some new programs or obscure but neat shows will show up someday

[]:             Quote Post by swamp147 » Tue Aug 12, 2008 10:14 pm Don't most people who watch Eva watch it on DVD, VHS, online, or downloaded anyways? It's so much more convenient, and you'll need to watch it again (or 3x or 4....) to know what's going on (or just ofr plain enjoyment, well I guess its similar to knowing what's going on). Plus I don't think they show Death, EoE, and Rebuild on TV (or do they? I don't know for sure).

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Aug 12, 2008 10:19 pm swamp147 wrote: Don't most people who watch Eva watch it on DVD, VHS, online, or downloaded anyways? It's so much more convenient, and you'll need to watch it again (or 3x or 4....) to know what's going on (or just ofr plain enjoyment, well I guess its similar to knowing what's going on).

[]:             Quote Post by swamp147 » Tue Aug 12, 2008 10:24 pm Sachi_13 wrote: swamp147 wrote: Don't most people who watch Eva watch it on DVD, VHS, online, or downloaded anyways? It's so much more convenient, and you'll need to watch it again (or 3x or 4....) to know what's going on (or just ofr plain enjoyment, well I guess its similar to knowing what's going on).

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 12, 2008 11:17 pm Iron Rooster wrote: Yeah, I like Bleach. I'm a dubbie/subbie person. I watch a dub if I don't wanna spend a lot of time reading. Too bad so many dubs mess up the messages and effects of shows a lot.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Aug 12, 2008 11:31 pm swamp147 wrote: Plus I don't think they show Death, EoE, and Rebuild on TV (or do they? I don't know for sure).

[]:             Quote Post by simon » Wed Aug 13, 2008 4:39 am Iron Rooster wrote: Adult Swim viewers want people with swords, blood, demons, and lots of blood shed. Also, guns are also very welcome. None of the viewers want to spend fifteen minutes or more thinking when the next showing of Bleach is gonna come on in five.
summary:
[]: [as] needs to show Eva more often             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Tue Aug 12, 2008 4:54 pm They've shown it a grand total of once. They still have the license, and it's regarded as one of the best anime series ever... so I wonder what gives?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Aug 12, 2008 6:25 pm They've actually showed it about 3 times, but w/e. Eva migh
